---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence summary of the proposed feature.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve? Reference any
academic, regulatory, or industry source where relevant.

## Proposed API / interface

Sketch the public function signature, CLI flag, or schema change.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why is this one better?

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or links.
